chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-906 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For hearing of main case. ------ 10.09.2025 Mr. Razi Khan Nabi Bux R. Chandio, Advocate a/w Petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General, Sindh. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Additional Prosecutor General, Sindh assisted by Zain-ul-Abideen Abbasi, Assistant Prosecutor General, Sindh a/w Inspector Ghulam Mustafa Khoso, S.H.O. P.S. City, Kamber, Inspector Shafique Hussain Kanasiro, S.H.O. P.S. Behram and SIP Zulfiquar Ali on behalf of S.S.P. Kamber-Shahadadkot. ------ Pursuant to the process, the police officers, present, file their respective comments, taken on record. The police officers have also submitted the CRO of the petitioner as well as his brother, the alleged detenue and submitted that they, being involved in a series of criminal cases, have maintained this petition only to exert the illegal pressure upon the police so that they may not perform their paramount function; however, they undertake that whenever the alleged detenue will be surfaced or arrested, he shall be produced before the Court of law having jurisdiction. Learned counsel for the petitioner, when confronted shows his apprehension that the police have made the demand of illegal gratification and in case they failed to fulfill their demands, the alleged detenue might be killed by showing a fake encounter or will be implicated in some other criminal cases. Since life and liberty of a citizen have been put at stake and subsequent raid so conducted by the Magistrate through proceedings initiated by the petitioner before the Court below were failed, yet S.S.P.

Learned counsel for the petitioner, when confronted shows his apprehension that the police have made the demand of illegal gratification and in case they failed to fulfill their demands, the alleged detenue might be killed by showing a fake encounter or will be implicated in some other criminal cases. Since life and liberty of a citizen have been put at stake and subsequent raid so conducted by the Magistrate through proceedings initiated by the petitioner before the Court below were failed, yet S.S.P. Kamber-Shahdadkot is directed to look into the matter personally and ensure earlier recovery of the alleged detenue. In case of recovery, if the alleged detenue found involved in any criminal case, he shall be produced before the Court of law having jurisdiction under intimation to this Court. In view of the denial statements of the official respondents, seemingly this petition has served its purpose, which is hereby disposed of. A copy of this order be sent through fax to D.I.G.P. Larkana Range and S.S.P. Kamber-Shahdadkot for compliance. Judge Judge Manzoor
